reviews.text: One of the best hotels I've ever stayed in 👍🏻

Great housekeeping service at The Apurva Kempinski Bali! Poni and Rahpada kept the room spotless and beautifully arranged every day. Really appreciated their attention to detail and warm, friendly service—thank you for making the stay so comfortable!

Helpful hint: Great basketball court just outside the hotel and can ask the concierge for a basketball ball. Fantastic hotel. Excellent staff, every person, just fantastic all extremely professional. Room is just a pleasure, the mattress so soft, bedsheets and all are top quality. For lunch had the fish and pasta there, just great. Great atmosphere to chill with some drinks, and there is this waitress there so nice, she understood I had craving for chocolate and got me some free chocolate the give to every guest that checks out. Breakfast was really not to my personal taste, but there are so many fantastic restaurants around there and location is great. Cafe Muse nearby has the most amazing eggs Benedict for breakfast.
loved it!! the massage was amazing and they had some drinks for after!
Spending time with sisterrrr at salsa deli n oku🥰🥰🥰

​My wife and I thoroughly enjoyed our 5-day stay at the Kempinski. The entire experience was exceptional! The food was amazing, the rooms were great, but the absolute best part of our trip was the warm and friendly staff. A big thank you to every single team member we interacted with. I’d like to send a very special shoutout to Lisna (Concierge) and Juni (Housekeeping) for going above and beyond to make our stay so memorable. Another huge thank you to the Pala restaurant staff—Hendra 0, Dewi, Natasia, and Novi—who were incredibly warm and accommodating. Thank you all once again. We hope to be back very soon!

The hotel was remarkable! The staff here were all very friendly.
I enjoyed my afternoon tea at the lobby area and the staff including Saudis were very attentive and kind, explained to me about the local desert I was having.
Thank you so much!!
Very polite and attentive staff especially Angga, great hospitality with a little surprise of the birthday cake. Highly recommended for vacations.

From the moment we arrived for holiday and until we left the whole experience at the hotel  was fabulous. The service provided by the staff, facilities  and location was exceptional. The staff are very attentive, kind and friendly. They cannot do enough to make your stay more special. We stayed in a two bedroom villa which was stunning. The housekeeping staff kept the villa beautifully clean and drinks and snacks were kept fully stocked everyday. 

We had breakfast at the lounge every morning,  Wiwik and Okta were extremely attentive and helpful as were all the staff. They would great us with smiles each day. 

I just wanted to say thank you for a fabulous holiday!

My first time staying at Apurva Kempinski.
My first impression was excellent. All the staff were very friendly and prompt during check-in.
Guests were escorted to their rooms and explained all the areas and activities at the hotel. Our room was upgraded from a regular view (outside the hotel) to a garden view (inside the hotel). Other than the view, everything was the same.

Upon arrival, the room was provided with a bathrobe and slippers for the little one as requested, and free amenities (soap, shampoo, toothpaste, and toothbrush) were provided.

However, based on my experience staying at similarly priced hotels, I feel Kempinski doesn't pay enough attention to other small details.

1. The shower in the bathtub was blocked, so I had to move to the other shower area to rinse off.
2. The TV remote had low/broken batteries (often wouldn't work).
3. The cleaning service took the towels and didn't replace them immediately.
4. The breakfast, with an additional price of around 1 million rupiah, wasn't worth it. The fried rice was hard (very hard). The miso soup was salty. The Cawanmusi was salty. The wine was still dirty and dusty. The signature turmeric and tamarind jamu (herbal drink) was too sour.
5. I booked through the website at 12 noon on the 29th, and no payment link was sent until 11:00 PM on the 30th. It stated that if payment was not made according to the payment link instructions, the order would be considered canceled. The hotel phone number couldn't be reached; I had to wait until 8:00 AM for the reservations department to process the payment link. Fearing a lack of rooms, I booked through a third party. Sadly, booking through a third party doesn't give me any additional member points, etc.

I rate the kids' activities at Kempinski 7/10. There are plenty of toys in the kids' club, but they aren't arranged well, so only a few can be played with, perhaps displayed on the toy shelves (not just thrown in containers, all the toys are mixed up). The dolls looked dirty. The guards were on standby upstairs, but none interacted with the lower play area.
Otherwise, it's quite good. The unique design makes kids happy when they enter. There are bicycles, cars, etc.

Just a few suggestions from me:
- A mini farm could be added for the kids' area.
- In-room service could be improved, especially in terms of the duration. One portion of oxtail soup arrived within an hour.

Cleanliness is excellent.
All the staff who passed by always greeted us and were very proactive in helping.

Will I return? Maybe when Kempinski is operational in Ubud.

Thank you for the service during my stay. All the staff were very friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

Absolute chaos and zero hospitality.
Check-in was an unmitigated disaster. There is no queue system, no updates, and no communication. We were told to wait in the lounge, but apparently, "service" is DIY here—I had to physically ask for a welcome drink and towel while staff ignored us. After 35 minutes, we finally got to the desk only to be told our room wasn't even ready. For a hotel of this "caliber," this level of incompetence is shocking. Disappointing is an understatement
A great place
Great. Stayed two days & night at the commencement of our holiday and accommodated our early check in after a long flight. Looked after us very well.
Pala restaurant- We served by Hendra 0 amazing service thank you so much

My stay at The Kempinski Bali was, unfortunately, underwhelming and left me quite disappointed. While the property itself is visually stunning and the rooms are beautifully designed, the overall experience did not match the level of luxury expected.

Service throughout the resort felt impersonal, lacking the warmth and attentiveness you would anticipate. There were also maintenance issues, including rusty pipes, which required staff to attend twice—something that detracted from the overall comfort of the stay.

The dining experience was equally disappointing. The food was less than ordinary and did not reflect the standards of a high-end resort. The Sunday brunch, in particular, was poorly executed—overcrowded, understaffed, and with slow service from the chefs, which made the experience feel chaotic rather than enjoyable.

Overall, while the aesthetics of the resort are impressive, the service, maintenance, and dining experience fell short, leaving a sense of missed potential.

What a fantastic hotel, from check-in to departure. The surroundings are beautiful and the hotel architecture is absolutely stunning. All of the staff went above and beyond to accommodate us - our pool villa was amazing, we loved every minute. Housekeepers work tirelessly to maintain the rooms and grounds which are spotless. The family dined at restaurant Koral for lunch which was an unforgettable experience and I should add the early morning tour of the fish tunnel offered via the kids club was amazing.

Special mentions to Arta who works around the pool area and made us feel so very welcome, also Dara (?) who amongst other things delivered our room service late at night in the midst of a tropical storm with a smile on his face even when soaked through! Wiwik and Okta from the Villa restaurant also went above and beyond to make our stay perfect. You are all simply amazing and we thank you very much. 

We hope to return soon and will recommend this resort to anyone visiting Nusa Dua, especially for first timers like us who want to ease in slowly to Bali life.
It was really great, with a beautiful hotel and an amazing view!! Thank you, Tyo Jiun, for helping me so kindly and politely~~ 💗
We went for a brunch in Pala, really good and nice service. High level
I wanna come here again and again
Wow what a place true Balinese luxury and an amazing private beach. Will be back asap!

I booked the two bedroom villa for 2 nights to celebrate my wife's birthday.

The villa was gorgeous and super clean. Very meticulous details, very well stocked free mini bar with full sized glass bottles of Indonesian traditional snacks, free sunhats and mosquito repellent sprays.

The breakfast at the Villa Lounge was awesome with the ala carte menu quality (included) better than many restaurants.

Shout-out to the excellent service provided by Lady's in Red - Erin, Jennifer, Summer and the other Lady's in Red on duty. Especially to Erin for her constant check-ins and arranging for a cake and beautiful flowers, and to Jennifer for arranging a very nice room decoration on my wife's birthday with the third party vendor at short notice.

Stayed in many five star hotels but Apurva Kempinski's service and experience is one step ahead.
The room is nice and clean but for that price a bit less, but the money that we spent can be used to enjoy the facilities there because it is really spacious and front of the beach.

I booked the two bedroom villa for 2 nights to celebrate my wife's birthday.

The villa was gorgeous and super clean. Very meticulous details, very well stocked free mini bar with full sized glass bottles of Indonesian traditional snacks, free sunhats and mosquito repellent sprays.

The breakfast at the Villa Lounge was awesome with the ala carte menu quality (included) better than many restaurants.

Shout-out to the excellent service provided by Lady's in Red - Erin, Jennifer, Summer and the other Lady's in Red on duty. Especially to Erin for her constant check-ins and arranging for a cake and beautiful flowers, and to Jennifer for arranging a very nice room decoration on my wife's birthday with the third party vendor at short notice.

Stayed in many five star hotels but Apurva Kempinski's service and experience is one step ahead.

Everything was great during our stay at Apurva Kempinski. The interior is luxurious and beautifully designed, and the view is absolutely stunning. The swimming pool is lovely, facing lush green trees, which creates a very calm and relaxing atmosphere.

We stayed in a Grand Deluxe Lagoon Room, which was nice overall since its terrace direct to the lagoon. Upon entering the room, we were pleasantly surprised with a complimentary cake with a handwritten message. It felt very sincere and thoughtful from the Guest Relations team. The cake was delicious, and my kids really loved it.

We also had a blast at the Coral Attraction aquarium in Apurva Kempinski! 😊 My kids were mesmerized by the vibrant corals and marine life. The interactive experience was engaging and educational, making it a highlight of our stay. Great way to unwind and connect with nature in a luxurious setting. Kudos to the team for creating such a unique and memorable experience.

Breakfast had a good variety of food, and everything was enjoyable. All staffs who was very warm and welcoming. All staff members were friendly with our kids and very helpful throughout our stay. They personally came to ask about our stay and breakfast experience and even offered a complimentary service for our holiday.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience. I will definitely come back again in the near future.
Thank you, Apurva Kempinski. 🍃💖
Love it!
Thank you to Medya and her team team for making us feel so welcome during our vacation. A truely wonderful experience.

Beautiful resort with stunning architecture and a relaxing atmosphere. We appreciated the room upgrade, although there was some initial miscommunication regarding the associated benefits, which slightly affected our arrival experience.

During Nyepi, service responsiveness (particularly room service) was slower than expected, and there were minor maintenance issues in the room.

That said, the team was helpful in addressing matters, and we still had a pleasant stay overall. With better consistency, the experience could be even more seamless.

I've been to Apurva 3 times and it's always been upgraded thanks to the very kind staff 🫶🏻 playing at the beach is clean & quiet, very different from other beaches. At the beach, Mr. Rimuadi helped me, very nice and helpful, super love the service, even refused my tip 🫶🏻
One of the best places in Bali.

I would like to thank the room staff, Putra and Dedi.

We visited for our honeymoon and the accommodation is so good!
Somehow the hotel is pet  friendly but they didn’t allow dog into the bar, how that can logically work?
nice hotel
Best hotel
I met Mas Weda, the bellboy, he was really helpful and explained in detail when we were traveling around with the buggy🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻 Mas Weda is the best

Love the hotel's design and ambience

Great service from all the staff, always smiling
The breakfast could be improved (the variety is limited and the taste is average)
Thank you for your service, Sudiasih
Great view for high tea. Very majestic place. Everything here exudes opulence. The croissant is surprisingly good.
Nice place
This hotel is very spacious, world class

The place, in terms of design and facilities, is very, very beautiful, and the service is excellent. However, its drawback is the lack of a separate area for adults, meaning it's not suitable for honeymooners or adults only. All facilities are shared, and this was honestly a source of annoyance, especially in the mornings. Our room had a partial sea view and was close to the pools, so the soundproofing wasn't sufficient for a comfortable, undisturbed sleep. It's more suitable for families.
Very nice cleaning service
What a beautiful place. Loved the food and desserts as we celebrated my twins birthday.  And my daughter loved the spa treatment. I am going back in a couple of days again ♥️

Really pleased with our stay here. Location is excellent. Every member of staff we crossed paths with was pleasant and polite. The concierge was very helpful. Rooms are stylish, clean (and well cleaned) and comfortable. I would highly recommend staying here and if I ever come back to Budapest will be staying again myself. Thanks for helping make it an excellent and memorable visit.
Friendly staff. Motorcycle parking is a bit far from the lobby for drop-offs.
The playground is really nice and the older siblings are really friendly. Especially Sunari, she's really nice and friendly, and Arya is also a really sweet and funny person ☺☺☺
This is Apurva Kempinski hotel, one of the most luxurious hotel in SEA, what else do you want?

I recently stayed here and had a fantastic experience, but what truly set this hotel apart was the integrity and helpfulness of the staff.

I managed to lose my sunglasses near the pool and had honestly given up on them. I never expected to see them again. However, Vera and Yuti went out of their way to track them down and return them to me.

It’s rare to find such honest and proactive service. Knowing that the team looks out for their guests like this makes a huge difference. Huge thanks to Vera and Yuti for turning my day around! I’ll definitely be back.

We have dinner at the Pala Restaurant
The place is comfortable, given a place directly facing the beautiful view
The service is really good, from coming to leaving they are well served and the birthday is celebrated
Pala Restaurant is the best❤️
Astungakara next if we have time let’s go to Koral Restaurant❤️🥰

Elegant. Just relax. Luxury 100%. Comfort. The amazing food. People and their friendliness is 10/10. The rooms very ganres. The
Attention every day in the room is impeccable. Each restaurant is a unique space. Full of nature.

Highly recommend staying at this resort. We stayed in the junior suite and the room was very spacious and clean which included our own private pool. We had the privileges of having Satriya host our stay. He was very accommodating and provided thorough explanations to all our queries. Thank you a great experience

We have had the most incredible experience at the Apurva Kempinski in Nusa Dua.
It is an incredible experience of pure perfection from the moment you check in until you (reluctantly) leave to return.
Every staff member from senior staff to room attendants to the fabulous ground staff and beach attendants are so warm, friendly and respectful. We loved the experience so much we booked to come back next year while we were sitting next to the pool! We wish to acknowledge all staff but also some standouts: Erica, Denny and above all the amazing Dedi! We have never felt more welcome anywhere before! To complete the amazing experience is the suggestion by Housekeeping to have your laundry done so all you have to do when you get home is pack it away!! And a very special mention to the Cliff Chef, Leona. She was so thoughtful in suggesting that she make us a traditional Balinese breakfast which was absolutely Michelin star quality 🥰
See you next year
Suksma!
Braith and Kim
One of the best hotel in the world ❤️❤️
I will definitely come back to figure out why they charged me 200 euros after my departure, even though everything was paid for!!!

Very impressive architecture and service was awesome. It's a very big property and the buggy service helped alot. Kids club was also awesome for my 7 year old and the beach was also very clean. Love it!

The first time, around 7pm, we were at 3328 going to the lobby. We took the elevator down and then found the swimming pool. We were a bit confused; there was no one to ask! Finally, we climbed the stairs from the bottom, which was quite a bit, until we reached the exit. It would be nice if there were officers on standby at certain points.

I've never written a review before, either positive or negative, but in this case, I feel compelled to share my experience.
I'm staying at this hotel in a villa with a small child. Upon check-in, I spent about 30 minutes explaining in detail to the kitchen staff how to prepare puree for my one-year-old. However, the next day, the staff member was unavailable, and another cook fulfilled the order. As a result, the smoothie was poorly prepared: it was cold and lumpy, and delivery was delayed by about an hour.
During this time, I unsuccessfully tried to contact the concierge, the operator, and the food delivery service; my calls remained unanswered for about an hour. An hour later, the staff responded with questions about how they could help, but by that point, the situation no longer required discussion, but rather timely and high-quality performance.
I also encountered difficulties even resolving basic delivery-related issues. Overall, it seems the staff's work is perfunctory and not focused on genuinely helping guests. Unfortunately, the level of service at this hotel was extremely poor. I should also note that I experienced health issues during my stay, which I attribute to the food at the hotel.
Wonderful hotel, responsive staff, delightful place❤️
Huge resort, great restaurants, great facilities and great service!!
Very friendly staff. You feel really pampered there.

We had an excellent experience staying at The Apurva Kempinski. The service was consistently outstanding.

We also received wonderful service from Nantha, and our experience at Selasar Deli with Nina was especially warm and welcoming.

We truly appreciated the late check-out, and overall, the entire team delivered a very satisfying level of service.

A highly recommended hotel.

The hotel, room, facilities, and service were exceptional.

After checking out, I left something in my room, and the helpful bellboy, Weda, quickly retrieved it.
Amazing architecture, beautiful views. We stayed in a junior suite, room was a good size, excellent quality and clean. Service was was exceptional
Very good
Hi I my name is calista this place is a great hotel to go to! Outside there is a pool
Excellent Hotel and service

Spectacular hotel, stunning architecture, foyer and pools. Incredible views, wide variety of breakfast options. Great gym and comfortable beds. Apurva Kempinski really ‘wowed’ I would love to stay here again. Only downside is young people sneaking in to use the pools. Very disrespectful to paying guests plus they take up loungers and are quite obvious eating their snacks from the local shops…! A wrist band system like club med would solve this. Overall the best resort I’ve stayed in.
Very good hotel with great location

We started our Bali trip at this resort to unwind and adjust to the significant time difference from the USA.  We made the right decision as this property was serene and beautiful.  The two bedroom villa was the perfect size for a family of four and among the nicest we have stayed at.  All staff at the property we encountered provided exceptional service.  All meals provided were delicious.  Would recommend this location for those travelling with children.

We truly love the people here. Pak Arya, Bu Sintia, Chef Leony always greet us with warm smiles and provide such kind, attentive assistance at the Cliff Lounge, for me, husband and my baby’s diet. 
The Lady in Red team has also been very prompt in helping us. Although one of our room requests was not noted, it’s really the genuine hospitality and overall customer experience that keep us coming back.
We do hope to see more variety added to the Cliff Lounge menu in the future, particularly for its afternoon tea and evening cocktail time, to make the experience even better.

OK I WOULD NOT GO TO KORAL RESTAURANT! Food was for admiration only. Taste for vegetarians was very poor. Some meat options were ok but left half of our food.
Did joke about going to McDonalds afterwards with my wife. We went there for her landmark birthday- she was disappointed with the food.
The manager overheard our conversation and brought over a vegetarian spaghetti dish as recompense but was just as bad.
The restaurant was 80% empty. Wonder why???
The beach is lovely although there was no control over the beach Cabana’s from the staff- so be careful if you leave for more than 20 mins they will give it away- we got ours back and left the two laughing Buddha’s in shame👍🏿
Loved the gym and pools and smiley staff. Can’t forget the immense views from the hotel and the Koi carp❤️
The breakfasts were lacking in flavour so you have express your desires with the waitress and hope your dish can be modified- hit & miss to be honest.
Overpriced and under served - try the other ones nearby👍🏿
It's really delicious and the staff are friendly~

I had an amazing stay at this hotel. The room was absolutely stunning, especially with the private infinity pool overlooking the ocean, it felt incredibly relaxing to swim while enjoying such a breathtaking view.

The staff were very friendly, polite, and always ready to help, which made the whole experience even more pleasant and comfortable.

The only small downside was that the buffet didn’t offer a wide variety of dishes. However, the quality of the food was still good.

Overall, it was a wonderful experience, and I would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a relaxing and luxurious getaway.

Very good hotel hotel, especially if you booked room 100m2 with pool. There is included afternoon tea, alcohol drink 5-7pm. Special lounge with all day cofe, tea and soft drinks.
Very tasty food and sweet in patiserie in Lobby floor.
Very unprofessional. During check-in, we had to wait quite a long time and were only able to enter our room around 5:00 PM.

My worst experience staying in a 5-star hotel. I have stayed in many 5-star hotels around the world, this is the first time I have received street food service from a hotel that is said to be good. Since I arrived, the shower has been leaking. During Nyepi, I ordered food to the room, they said it would take 1 hour, but it came in 2 hours. When the food arrived, the wrong one was brought. There were not enough food items. At breakfast at the restaurant, I only ordered eggs, but by the time I finished breakfast, they still hadn't come. My baby needed a baby chair, and I had to wait 10 minutes. When the baby chair arrived, it was given to someone who had just arrived. Lastly, when we were cleaning up in the room and about to check out, the hotel staff came by the bell and asked us to leave in 5 minutes. I was thrown out!! It was the first time I was a little late and thrown out of the room. They said check out was at 12:00. I was 10 minutes late. And that wasn't because I was lying down. But my baby was vomiting because the food that was ordered last night was supposed to be in an hour, but it came in 2 hours plus an extra wait because my baby's food was not enough. This is the first time I've been reminded of check-out time by being kicked out and given 5 minutes to vacate the room. He thought I couldn't pay, what if I was charged extra for having to extend my check-out time because I was too late?
Luxury 5-star hotel, very attentive team, delicious breakfast, everything was top-notch.

Amazing hotel. Ride buggies from one part of resort to the other. No long walks in the hot sun. Lagoon room was the best for chilling in peace. Neighbors keep to themselves. Cabanas on the beach were plenty and well shaded. Cocktails and food provided were delicious. Koral restaurant was a great experience. Eating in the aquarium with a diver taking pictures with us.
So much fun, excellent service, wonderful holiday
A very nice hotel!

At the Kempinski Corvinus, you will discover old-world service in a modern and beautiful hotel: friendly check-in with suitcase service, turn-down service in the evening, helpful & friendly staff all the way through. Room OK sized, clean, functional, nicely decorated. Bathroom with shower and separate bath tub. Some rooms have a view into the courtyard, which makes them very quiet. Internet worked excellently all the way through, with easy log-in (no room number required). Location is great for visiting Budapest: in the middle of the historic part of Pest, just a few minutes from the Danube. Great for business meetings, too, with excellent meeting facilities.

We were looking for a relaxing holiday where we could stay in one place, be well looked after, and still have moments of excitement — Apurva Kempinski Bali delivered exactly that and more. This has easily been one of our best holidays.

Even before arrival, the service stood out. We requested memory foam pillows (important for my wife’s comfort). While uncommon, the team took the time to understand and accommodate — a small detail that set the tone.

I initially chose this hotel for its architecture and landscaping, but what truly exceeded expectations was the genuine and consistent service throughout.

We booked a suite and were fortunate to receive an upgrade (thank you Amex and low season). From arrival, everything felt seamless. Angel welcomed us warmly, and we checked in at the Cliff Lounge — calm, private, and beautifully handled. Dina looked after us throughout, from a temporary suite to eventually escorting us to our upgraded oceanfront suite — the view and space were incredible.

The resort itself is breathtaking. The lobby alone is worth experiencing — grand, detailed, and inspired by the Majapahit empire.

What truly sets this place apart is the people.

A special mention to Sintia at the Cliff Lounge, who made our stay incredibly memorable. She organised a beautiful birthday breakfast (with help from my amazing wife), complete with a cake, handwritten card, and serenade. She also remembered our preferences — like fresh mango every morning. Arya and Dedi continued the same level of care in her absence.

Chef Leoni went above and beyond — what started as a casual mention of a nostalgic snack turned into her sourcing and preparing it specially for us the next morning. Chef Sudarti continued that same level of care.

There were many other wonderful team members — Zidan, Tude, Rahayu, Febrian — all warm and attentive. Even when something wasn’t standard, the team handled it beautifully. Adele offered thoughtful alternatives when chai latte wasn’t available, and Edwin at Kubu made a lovely teh tarik.

Dining was excellent throughout. Koral was a highlight — the underwater tunnel dining experience with the degustation menu was unforgettable (thank you Jesti, Vina, and Cahya). I also celebrated my birthday at Izakaya, where Jaklyn and Diah made the evening very special.

Cliff Lounge access was a standout — from afternoon tea to evening cocktails, we felt completely spoiled.

We also tried breakfast at Pala — busier but with a wider buffet selection. Despite this, Sariani and Edi still provided warm, attentive service and remembered my wife’s drink preference.

Other highlights included Reef (beautiful beachfront dining — thank you Bagus) and Pala Rooftop (Eja and Denny were fantastic).

The facilities are equally impressive — pools, beach activities, and wellness amenities. Special thanks to the fun and energetic beachfront team: Suarsa, Suwika, Arta, Gusti, and Willy.

We loved our stay so much that we extended a few more nights. Ayu made this seamless and helped us remain in the same room.

Lastly, thank you to the “Ladies in Red” — Naomi, Summer, Niar, and Jenifer — for always assisting with care and efficiency.

Overall, the level of genuine care and warmth here is truly special.

We’ve stayed in many resorts globally, but this one stands out. We didn’t just feel like guests — we felt genuinely looked after.

We’ll definitely be back.
Amazing! We will definitely be back at Kempinski!

11/10 Experience – Truly Exceptional Stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali

We just completed a 4-night stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali with my wife and our 7-year-old son, and honestly… if I could give this place 11/10, I absolutely would.

I rarely write reviews like this, but I feel compelled to say—if someone leaves a bad review here, they’re likely the issue, not the hotel. This place is simply outstanding.

From the moment we arrived, the experience was flawless. Every single staff member—from bag drop, front desk, restaurants, pool, to housekeeping—was warm, attentive, and genuinely kind. You can tell the level of training here is exceptional, but more importantly, it feels sincere and not forced.

What stood out most was the consistency. Everywhere we went, we were greeted with smiles. At one point, I was walking by the pool juggling a couple of beers, and a staff member immediately offered to help carry them—completely unprompted.

Some special mentions:

The rooftop bar team was fantastic—one of the staff even bonded with my son because he reminded her of her own child. That personal touch meant a lot.

Breakfast at the lounge was a highlight—Vanny took such great care of us every morning.

At the lobby bar, Kristianti made us feel incredibly welcome.

The team at Reef Restaurant was always prompt and attentive.

Dinner at Bai Yun was a memorable experience, and Chef Ho coming out to interact with guests was a lovely touch.

Housekeeping deserves a big shoutout—every time we returned, the room felt fresh, inviting, and perfectly reset.

The property itself is stunning. The architecture is grand and unique, and the grounds are beautifully maintained. The spa area, in particular, is breathtaking—one of the nicest we’ve seen.

If I had to give any suggestion at all, it would be minor:

Perhaps consider adding some pool floats for guests to relax on (though I understand this might detract from the clean infinity pool aesthetic).

I did notice a few signs of water leakage in certain areas, which made me wonder about long-term maintenance—but nothing that impacted our stay.

These are very small points in what was otherwise an exceptional experience.

I know this review might sound overly positive—almost like a paid review—but it genuinely isn’t. This hotel exceeded our expectations in every way, and we left already thinking about when we can come back.

Highly, highly recommended.

The hotel is a masterpiece in design. Rooms are luxurious, and service is faultless. The choice of restaurants at the hotel is great so I could enjoy a different experience everyday for my weeklong stay. Breakfast was a lavish spread and staff went out of their way to prepare special requests. Duty manager Hardie was gracious and upgraded my room, when scheduled building repairs interrupted our enjoyment.
All the wait staff, chefs, porters, front office and ground crew are specially courteous and welcoming.
The views over the cliff are breaktaking, while the pools all over the hotel mean you will always get a secluded spot for yourself, or enjoy with fellow guests- as you may choose!
The Hotel Spa is special too and worth a visit.

The room is clean.
It was a very comfortable stay here.

Our stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali has become truly memorable ❤️

From the very first minute, there is a high level of service: attentive and genuinely friendly staff who do everything to make the rest comfortable and easy. The property is impressive - the architecture, views and atmosphere make it feel like you are in a separate world of beauty and tranquillity.

Rooms are spacious, stylish and thoughtful to the minutiae. I especially want to note the cleanliness and quality of service - all at a premium level.

Separate pleasure - restaurants: delicious, varied and very aesthetic. Breakfast is a separate kind of enjoyment altogether 😍

And, of course, the views... the pools, the ocean, the sunsets, all make recreation really special.

Thank you for the warm welcome and the atmosphere I want to return to time and time again. It's a place I really want to go back to 💫

I recently had the pleasure of staying at The Apurva Kempinski Bali for 2 nights with my two daughters, and it was truly an unforgettable experience. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with warm hospitality and exceptional service.

The hotel itself is stunning, with breathtaking architecture and beautiful ocean views. My daughters absolutely loved every moment of our stay, especially the pools and the spacious, comfortable room. The atmosphere was both luxurious and family-friendly, making it perfect for traveling with children.

We also enjoyed the variety of dining options, all of which offered delicious food and great service. The staff were incredibly attentive and made sure that we felt comfortable throughout our stay.

Overall, our stay was nothing short of amazing. It was a perfect short getaway filled with relaxation, fun, and quality time with my daughters. We would definitely love to come back again.

Our stay at Apurva Kempinski Bali was exceptional. This was our first Kempinski experience worldwide, and as frequent travellers, we were genuinely impressed — the level of service and attentiveness here is truly on another level.

From the moment we arrived until checkout, the Lady in Red team — Jennifer, Summer, Naomi, and Niar — looked after us incredibly well. They assisted with multiple requests promptly, responded to even our random questions with ease, and made everything feel seamless throughout our stay. It honestly felt like they were always one step ahead.

During check-in, we were warmly welcomed by Dina from the Cliff Lounge, and she immediately stood out. She was attentive, lively, confident, and carried herself with such professionalism and warmth. It genuinely felt like she had been working at the hotel for many years — from the way she spoke to how she engaged with us. We were very surprised to learn she is still a trainee.

Our time at the Cliff Lounge became a daily highlight. Sintia, Arya, and Dedi were always checking in on us during our meals to make sure we were well looked after, and their consistency and care did not go unnoticed. Every staff member we encountered was incredibly accommodating — always willing to prepare food and beverage items that my wife and I requested, even when they weren’t on the menu. A special thank you to Sintia, who went above and beyond — remembering our preferences, organising my wife’s daily mango, and making my birthday extra special. We truly wish we could name everyone at the Cliff Lounge, because every single staff member was lovely, welcoming, and always willing to go the extra mile.

One of the most meaningful moments of our stay was thanks to Chef Leone, who went out of her way to prepare Tapi Uleh — a dish I hadn’t had in 14 years since leaving Indonesia. It brought back very special childhood memories that I will carry with me for a long time. I was deeply touched by that gesture. Thank you as well to Chef Sudarti, who was always checking in to see if we wanted anything prepared beyond the menu.

The beachfront team — Suarsa, Suwika, Arta, and Gusti — also made a big impact on our stay. They were always willing to help, have a chat, and I had such fun yarning with these guys. They made my daily paddleboarding something I genuinely looked forward to each day.

We are also very grateful to Ayu from bookings, who assisted us when we decided to extend our stay for two more nights. She went out of her way to accommodate our very specific preferred room layout, and coordinated everything smoothly for us.

Another standout detail was the Tempur memory foam pillow provided for my wife, who has ongoing neck issues. We have stayed in many hotels around the world and often request this, but this is the first time it was genuinely to her liking and preference, and truly therapeutic.

Lastly, we absolutely loved the beach. The wave breaker made such a difference — for the first time, my wife was able to comfortably swim in the ocean in Bali, as the water was calm and enjoyable. That alone made this stay even more special for us.

We also loved the architecture and landscaping — especially the daily walks along the beautifully designed paths lined with palm trees and climbing ivy. It made the entire experience feel even more serene and memorable.

From start to finish, everything was effortless, and for the first time in a while, we left a hotel not wanting to leave.

For our first Kempinski experience, this has set the bar incredibly high. We will definitely be back — next time with our family.

Experienced 3 massages at Apurva Kempinski with Lola (signature massage), Yolanda (a Luxury Escapes included massage on a Zero G chair) & a foot massage with Sugi. All excellent with medium pressure with Sugi most “my medium” pressure. Ladies were all lovely & attentive. Stunning looking spa. Highly recommend
Love, love, love this place. Have been twice and both times have thoroughly been able to relax and unwind. The hospitality is unreal. Have recommended to many of my friends. We will be back

This is my second stay, but I've noticed a significant decline in service this year. There wasn't even water in the room, and no fruit 🍉. It's a far cry from my experiences in the previous four years. Should I consider switching hotels? Although I vacation in Bali every year...
The best five star hotel I've visited so far, such great service ! The room is so nice and clean when we arrived, also smells amazing.
Grand one of a kind lobby

We would definitely return to The Apurva on our next trip to Bali.
Hotel mewaah

11/10 Experience – Truly Exceptional Stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali

We just completed a 4-night stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali with my wife and our 7-year-old son, and honestly… if I could give this place 11/10, I absolutely would.

I rarely write reviews like this, but I feel compelled to say—if someone leaves a bad review here, they’re likely the issue, not the hotel. This place is simply outstanding.

From the moment we arrived, the experience was flawless. Every single staff member—from bag drop, front desk, restaurants, pool, to housekeeping—was warm, attentive, and genuinely kind. You can tell the level of training here is exceptional, but more importantly, it feels sincere and not forced.

What stood out most was the consistency. Everywhere we went, we were greeted with smiles. At one point, I was walking by the pool juggling a couple of beers, and a staff member immediately offered to help carry them—completely unprompted.

Some special mentions:

The rooftop bar team was fantastic—one of the staff even bonded with my son because he reminded her of her own child. That personal touch meant a lot.

Breakfast at the lounge was a highlight—Vanny took such great care of us every morning.

At the lobby bar, Kristianti made us feel incredibly welcome.

The team at Reef Restaurant was always prompt and attentive.

Dinner at Bai Yun was a memorable experience, and Chef Ho coming out to interact with guests was a lovely touch.

Housekeeping deserves a big shoutout—every time we returned, the room felt fresh, inviting, and perfectly reset.

The property itself is stunning. The architecture is grand and unique, and the grounds are beautifully maintained. The spa area, in particular, is breathtaking—one of the nicest we’ve seen.

If I had to give any suggestion at all, it would be minor:

Perhaps consider adding some pool floats for guests to relax on (though I understand this might detract from the clean infinity pool aesthetic).

I did notice a few signs of water leakage in certain areas, which made me wonder about long-term maintenance—but nothing that impacted our stay.

These are very small points in what was otherwise an exceptional experience.

I know this review might sound overly positive—almost like a paid review—but it genuinely isn’t. This hotel exceeded our expectations in every way, and we left already thinking about when we can come back.

Highly, highly recommended.

The moment you arrive at The Apurva Kempinski Bali, it feels less like checking into a hotel and more like stepping into a grand cultural landmark. The architecture is nothing short of majestic with an awe-inspiring blend of traditional Indonesian design and modern luxury. From the towering entrance to the sweeping views over the Indian Ocean, every detail is thoughtfully crafted to create a sense of scale and serenity.

A highlight of the stay is the Ocean view pool suite, which perfectly complements the resort’s sense of grandeur with a more intimate, private luxury. The suite offers expansive views of the ocean right from your terrace, and the private plunge pool becomes a serene retreat, ideal for a quiet morning dip or a relaxing sunset soak. There’s something especially indulgent about simply lounging in the pool with a cold beer in hand, taking in the endless blue horizon and letting time slow down. The seamless indoor-outdoor layout enhances the experience, allowing you to fully enjoy the coastal breeze and calming sound of the waves. It’s a space designed not just for comfort, but for truly unwinding in privacy.

The resort also stands out for its impressive variety of dining options. From refined culinary experiences to more relaxed settings, the range of restaurants ensures there’s something for every mood and occasion. You can easily spend days exploring different cuisines without ever leaving the property, which adds to the overall sense of ease and indulgence.

At Koral Restaurant, the setting is truly memorable—dining within an aquarium creates an immersive, almost surreal atmosphere. The menu leans towards refined, modern cuisine, and while the food is thoughtfully presented, it’s the ambience that makes it a standout occasion.

Pala Rooftop Bar offers a completely different vibe. Set against a panoramic backdrop, it’s the perfect place to unwind with cocktails or light bites while watching the sky shift at sunset. The relaxed yet elevated atmosphere makes it ideal for a casual evening, balancing great views with an easygoing energy.

For a more traditional dining experience, Bai Yun delivers refined Chinese cuisine in an elegant setting. The dishes are well-executed and comforting, offering familiar flavors with a touch of sophistication, perfect for those craving something classic during their stay.

What truly elevates the experience is the service. Warm, attentive, and consistently professional, the staff strike a perfect balance between hospitality and discretion. Whether it’s a simple request or a more personalized arrangement, everything is handled seamlessly, making you feel genuinely cared for throughout your stay.

That said, there were a couple of minor inconsistencies. The internet connection could be patchy at times, which may be noticeable for guests needing reliable connectivity. Additionally, there was an instance on the first day where a towel provided in the room was not up to expected cleanliness standards. The bottled water caps were also an inconvenience, as they would continue spinning without releasing, making them unexpectedly difficult to open. Over the course of the stay, this became more than a minor inconvenience. Several bottles that could not be opened were left untouched, and after a few days, these made up the bulk of the water provided in the room. By the last day, we effectively had no drinkable water, as multiple bottles remained sealed due to the faulty caps. While these issues did not significantly detract from the overall experience, they are areas the hotel could refine to better match its otherwise high standards.

Altogether, The Apurva Kempinski Bali offers a complete package of majestic surroundings, exceptional service, and diverse dining, all coming together to create a truly relaxing and memorable getaway.
Imbattable… A dream place from A to Z
Our room was maintained to a very high standard everyday. It is a credit to Eka, Suteja, Charles and Dedi. Please pass on our gratitude.

My stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I arrived, I was warmly welcomed by the incredibly friendly and attentive staff, who made me feel valued throughout my entire stay. Their genuine hospitality truly sets this resort apart.

The room was spotless, beautifully designed, and very well maintained. Every detail was thoughtfully prepared, creating a comfortable and luxurious atmosphere that made it hard to leave.

The hotel facilities are world-class, offering everything you need for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway. From the stunning pools to the well-equipped gym and serene spa, every corner of the resort is designed to impress.

Food was another highlight of my stay. The variety and quality were outstanding, with delicious options for every palate. Breakfast, in particular, was a treat, with a wide selection of both local and international dishes.

Overall, The Apurva Kempinski Bali exceeded my expectations in every way. If you’re looking for a luxurious escape with excellent service, beautiful surroundings, and top-notch amenities, this is definitely the place to be. Highly recommended!

Staying at the Kempinski was an unforgettable experience. The hotel is a masterpiece of classic European elegance — beautifully designed, unique in every detail, and full of character. The atmosphere is serene and luxurious, and you feel the quality the moment you arrive. The service is truly exceptional: warm, attentive, and personalised in a way that makes you feel genuinely cared for. Every interaction with the staff was thoughtful and professional. The dining, the ambience, the immaculate rooms, and the overall attention to detail all exceeded my expectations. Kempinski sets a new standard of luxury, and I would return without hesit

Everything about this resort was amazing - staff exceptionally friendly, rooms very clean, the massages were very professional. Our biggest disappointment was the food at the varied locations. When your vacation standards are far beyond what you expect from a luxury hotel, Kempinski in Budapest will pleasantly surprise you.

The service at every part of the resort was exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we felt like royalty. If you’re looking for a relaxing resort (we hardly left in our 6 days there), this place is hard to beat from our experience. We had a garden view cliff room - including access to the Cliff Lounge which I’d highly recommend.

Our Cliff Lounge breakfast was still buffet, but also included unlimited à la carte options, and every dish we ordered was incredible.

The Bakso (Indonesian meatball soup). I’d never tried before, but the chef helped me choose the ingredients and customise it to my liking, and would come over for a chat when bringing it to the table. It quickly became a favourite, having one every morning.

We loved having Cliff Lounge access. It was peaceful and quiet, the perfect escape when we wanted some downtime. Having refreshments available throughout the day and a dedicated bar for Cliff Lounge guests made it feel extra special.

All of the pools were beautiful and well serviced, with staff regularly coming around to assist with drinks and food. The beach area was also very well maintained and had paddle boards and games available.

Our room included a private pool. It was spacious, spotless, and comfortable. Housekeeping went above and beyond every day, keeping everything perfectly tidy and refreshed.

We ate at all of the restaurants and also ordered room service, and the food was consistently excellent across the resort. After becoming very sick on a previous Bali trip, I was a little hesitant returning, but that quickly disappeared thanks to the high standards of food preparation and service we saw throughout the resort.

We also really enjoyed the happy hour cocktails and wine at the Pala Rooftop Bar, which offered a beautiful view and a great atmosphere each evening (also part of our Cliff lounge access).

We can’t speak highly enough of the food and service. We’ve visited Bali 5 times now, and this has been one of our favourite & most impressive stays so far.

I didn't find anything special in the hotel except a beautiful building. The architect of the hotel itself and the rooms is astonishing in luxury, there's nothing to pick on. And the monkeys liked it (although they are constantly chased by hotel employees so as not to enter the territory and disturb tourists).  Everything else is pretty uniform and boring. There is no special wiping, no memorable moments left by the hotel. There's basically nothing to do there for more than five days. Plus, for those who go across the sea, this hotel is definitely not suitable, because the ocean in the afternoon you just won't find there -- very strong tides, the ocean is dirty and plus a lot of seaweed. In its concept, this hotel is more likely to suit people after 60 who only want to run between room and pool.
The only two big disappointments are the Coral restaurant on Kempinski property. At $300 per person for dinner without drinks, the dishes were very beautifully aesthetically designed, but completely tasteless and cotton wool-like. Also keep in mind that weddings and corporate events are often organized on site. In such a case, the employees collect in front of the pool for two days a large tent, which is respectively accompanied by the knocking of hammers, the rumbling of metal structures and the walking of crowds of construction workers between your sunbeds . And during the event itself you will trip over crowds of people from outside and listen to other people's toasts sounding on the entire hotel.

We stayed at the Apurva Kempinski Bali for our 10th wedding anniversary in September/October 2025, and we had the best time ever! The hotel is grand, sophisticated, classy, and breathtaking. From the moment you enter the lobby to every single area, it is truly amazing. The views overlooking the ocean are stunning!

We booked a cliff ocean front private pool suite and it was unbelievably amazing! We loved our private extended patio area to relax – it was very clean and very comfortable. Definitely recommend the cliff lounge suites for its additional perks, including a private pool and bar area, along with a separate departure lounge and restaurant for breakfast and afternoon tea. A huge thank you to Padma and Dede for their constant attentiveness and kindness during breakfast and afternoon tea!

The restaurants were honestly some of the best we've been to! Izakaya served fantastic Japanese cuisine, and we are grateful to Anastasia, Diane, Puta, Nadia, Wulan Cahyani, and many more for their wonderful hospitality.

We also enjoyed the Reef Beach Club, which became our afternoon go-to dining spot for its easy access to the pool and beach. A special shout out to I Kadek, Adi Anjana, and the amazing staff there!

At Bai Yun, we had an incredible Dim sum lunch and a hot pot dinner. Thanks to Yulyarini Ida for helping us navigate the hot pot experience!

Plenty of lounges on the beach and by the pool, and the infinity pool was a joy to swim in every day!

The spa is a must! The best spa experience ever and the massage was fantastic - thank you!

Finally, we want to give a special thanks to the Ladies in Red, especially Jessica, Jenifer, and Betsy, for their superb attentiveness and quick responses to any requests and for making our wedding anniversary a truly memorable experience.

If you're thinking about coming here, do not hesitate! Bali is beautiful, and so are the people. We will definitely be returning in the near future. 

Thank you again for an unforgettable stay!

This is truly a beautiful hotel. The architecture of the lobby alone is breathtaking. Paired with the peaceful music, sweeping views, and delicious gelato, you never want to leave.

My family and I came to Bali to coordinate my upcoming wedding details and we stayed at Apurva Kempinski for 7 days and 6 nights. From the moment we arrived we were welcomed by numerous members of staff. In all of our years of traveling, this hotel has by far the friendliest and most attentive team we have ever encountered.

Our Lady in Red, Jessica, made our stay completely seamless and was always just a text away. With her help, securing last-minute dinner reservations and arranging a late check-out was effortless. Our room attendants, Ade and Nanda, were equally wonderful - always friendly, thoughtful, and incredibly attentive. There is nothing quite like returning to a refreshed room and discovering a new towel animal waiting for you each night.

During our stay, we requested extra mangosteen and additional beverages for the mini fridge. Ade and Nanda continued to replenish them daily without us needing to ask again. Their attention to detail was remarkable; they began leaving extra bottles of water after noticing how many we went through each day. They even left me new bottles of water on the vanity after noticing that I would drink water as I get myself ready. Between Jessica, Ade, and Nanda, my fiancé and I would return to our room each evening to find a new little treat waiting for us to enjoy.

The dining experiences throughout the property were equally impressive. Room service was easy to access and order through our phones, with an extensive menu list. We enjoyed breakfast at Reef Beach Club, Pala, and Cliff Lounge, each providing its own unique atmosphere. The sushi at Izakaya by Oku practically melts in your mouth, and the signature course at Koral, dining while surrounded by the aquarium, is an unforgettable experience. Ending our night with some gelato from Selasar Deli became a regular routine.

For us, what truly makes or breaks a hotel is the staff. This property delivers both a surreal setting and an exceptional team. The views are stunning, and the people make it a place we would love to return to.
Amazing place to stay. Bai Yun restaurant is fantastic!

All good

This hotel is exceptional in many aspects.  It is large so there is a bit of walking, but this is made up by the huge range of places to sit and restaurants to eat in.

The cleaning staff Mustyani and Jeni were so excellent, they even filed any clothes that were left out, I threw out one of my dresses as I no longer wanted it but when we came back home that night, it was on the chair as I’m imagining they thought it had accidentally ended up in the bid, very kind and considerate of them

Very satisfying during the stay at the Kempinski hotel, especially the cuisine crafted by Chef Desak who made me miss and thank you for your attention.

Our stay at this hotel in Bali was truly unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, everything felt exceptional. The property itself is absolutely stunning , somehow even more beautiful than the photos, which is something you rarely experience.

amazing hotel

Wonderful hotel! The service and restaurants are excellent! We never got tired of the breakfasts over the 5 days, and there was a huge selection. However, I have one complaint about the hotel! When they were holding an event (in our case, we were there for a wedding), the hotel allowed dismantling and cleaning work to take place overnight, which kept us awake until 4 a.m.! Workers were making noise past our window and front door, loudly moving dishes and the entire tent on carts; it was incredibly noisy! The soundproofing in the rooms isn't designed to withstand such noise. It was our last night at the hotel, and we had to get up early for the airport. It was unpleasant! I consider this disrespectful to guests. Other guests shouldn't be disadvantaged when a wedding is held at the hotel... no one responded to our comment that night! But in the morning, when we were checking out, we complained about the noise again, and they apologized and, to make amends, called an airport shuttle. I hope the hotel will take action and not allow noisy work at night so that other guests do not have to face a similar situation!

April Cliff Lounge Service

Amazing, thank you for the room upgrade Annabella 🙏

Special mentions to:
1. Hotel manager Philipp, who on a chance meeting organised a “tour” of the resort’s vegetable garden and sustainable initiatives with Intan & Atil who were both engaging and passionate about their work.  This was a special highlight for us!

The Apurva Kempinski Bali is an ultra-luxury 5-star cliffside resort in Nusa Dua, offering a grand, open-air theater design that blends Balinese heritage with modern elegance. Opened in 2019, it features 475 guest rooms, suites, and villas, many with private plunge pools, set against breathtaking Indian Ocean views. The resort focuses on sustainability and has been recognized as one of the best sustainable hotels in Bali. It is ideal for both leisure travelers and weddings, boasting extensive event spaces and a cliff-top chapel. Known for diverse dining, including the iconic Koral Restaurant—Bali's first underwater aquarium dining experience—along with Izakaya by OKU and Bai Yun.

We had an absolutely wonderful stay at The Apurva Kempinski in Bali. The entire property is stunning – from the beautifully maintained gardens and pools to the elegant lobby and restaurants. The staff truly set this hotel apart. There were always plenty of team members around, and every single one was warm, friendly and genuinely happy to help. Any request was met with enthusiasm, and we never once felt like we were inconveniencing anyone.

A particular highlight for me was the buffet breakfast at Pala restaurant. As someone with vegan dietary requirements, I was incredibly impressed. The staff did far more than just point out what I could eat. They offered to have the chefs prepare custom dishes, suggested options I would never have thought of – from vegan sushi rolls and pancakes to specific rice dishes and dairy alternatives – and even asked in advance what I would like the following day so they could prepare everything before I arrived. That level of care made a real difference.

Shoutout to Natasia Devi for being one of the primary people serving us at the buffet breakfast.

Our stay at The Apurva Kempinski Bali was truly an experience of a lifetime. This is not just a hotel — it’s a world-class destination that delivers excellence at every level.

From the moment you arrive, the entrance takes your breath away. The architecture is grand, elegant, and deeply impressive. The entire property feels majestic, and you can genuinely feel its powerful, positive energy throughout the day.

The location is outstanding, perched on a cliff in Nusa Dua with panoramic views of the Indian Ocean. Waking up to that view every morning is something you simply cannot describe — you have to experience it. From sunrise to sunset, every moment feels special.

The rooms are luxurious, spacious, and beautifully designed with incredible attention to detail. Everything is spotless and perfectly maintained. Comfort, style, and privacy are combined flawlessly.

The service is on another level. The staff is professional, warm, attentive, and always ready to help — often before you even ask. Their hospitality makes you feel valued and genuinely welcomed.

The pools, beach access, restaurants, and every common area operate at the highest standard. There is absolutely nothing average here. Everything is top level.

My stay at Kempinski Hotels was, overall, a memorable experience. The property itself is absolutely gorgeous — truly stunning from the moment you walk in. If you're looking for a destination where you can stay on-site and not feel the need to leave, this is the perfect place. Everything you could possibly want is right there: beautiful surroundings, excellent dining, and a luxurious spa experience.
The spa, in particular, was the highlight of my stay. I booked a deep tissue massage, and it was hands down the best massage I’ve ever had in my life. My therapist was incredible — around 20 years old, from a small island, with a birthday in February (I wish I had gotten her name!). Her technique was outstanding: strong, intuitive, and incredibly effective. It was truly next-level, and I’m still thinking about how best massage I had.
That said, the spa’s front desk experience was disappointing. The check-in area was consistently busy and felt disorganized. When I went to retrieve cash to tip my therapist (because she absolutely deserved it), I handed it to the spa front desk, but the interaction felt rushed and dismissive. I left unsure whether the tip ever made it to her, which didn’t sit well with me. The lack of organization and attentiveness at the spa reception was a noticeable contrast to the quality of the treatment itself.
My first night check-in experience was also not ideal. I had two separate reservations — one through Chase and another through American Express — and when I initially arrived wearing casual travel clothes (sweatshirt and sweatpants), I felt somewhat brushed off. I couldn’t help but notice another couple being treated more warmly at the same time. Interestingly, once my reservation was associated with American Express, the tone of service seemed to improve. It’s difficult to describe precisely, but the shift in treatment felt noticeable. No guest should feel judged based on appearance or booking method.
On a very positive note, the Japanese restaurant on the property was phenomenal. The food, ambiance, and overall dining experience were exceptional and absolutely worth mentioning.
In summary, the property itself is breathtaking, the spa treatment was unforgettable, and the dining was outstanding. However, there are clear opportunities to improve consistency in guest service — particularly at the spa front desk and during initial check-in. With more attention to professionalism and organization in those areas, the experience could truly match the beauty and luxury of the setting.
Grand but has a commercial feel to it

Simply amazing beyond words. The Apurva Kempinski Bali is a breathtaking masterpiece that effortlessly blends grandeur, tranquillity, and refined luxury. From the moment you arrive, the architecture, soaring spaces, and perfectly manicured grounds leave a lasting impression. The ocean views are spectacular, the pools and terraces are beautifully designed, and every corner feels thoughtfully curated.

Our room was exceptionally spacious, pristine, and supremely comfortable, with exquisite attention to detail throughout. Dining options are diverse and of outstanding quality, while the bar selection is equally impressive. Most remarkable of all is the service — warm, gracious, intuitive, and consistently attentive, making every guest feel genuinely valued.

A truly world-class resort that sets the benchmark for luxury hospitality. Highly recommended and unforgettable.

Our experience at The Apurva Kempinski Bali was extremely disappointing and far below what anyone would expect from a 5-star luxury resort.

We arrived with a confirmed and fully paid reservation, only to be informed that our room was not available. No prior communication, no proactive solution. We were left waiting in the lobby for approximately 8 hours with very limited updates from the front desk.

Eventually, late in the evening, we were assigned a different room category than the one we had originally booked. By that time, changing hotel was no longer a realistic option.

Management assured us that we would receive a refund for the first night due to the inconvenience. More than six months later, despite follow-ups, the promised refund has not been processed.

What was particularly surprising for a hotel of this level was the lack of basic guest care during the wait. No meaningful assistance and no gesture of hospitality were offered while we remained in the lobby for most of the day.

For a property positioned as a luxury 5-star resort, reliability, transparency, and accountability should be standard. Unfortunately, in our case, those expectations were not met.

We hope this review encourages clearer communication and stronger management practices in the future. Potential guests should be aware and manage their expectations accordingly.

I spent 2 nights at The Apurva Kempinski Bali. 
I stayed at the one bedroom poolvilla.
While the hotel is considered quite expensive, I think it was worth it and want to stay again. The room was much more spacious than I expected, and the service at the Villa Lounge made my stay more comfortable and convenient.
I could eat the breakfast very late (until 12pm)at the villa lounge, it was soooo good. 
I don't want to wake up early to eat breakfast during the trip : ) 
Speak of lounge, the Villa Lounge manager, BAYU, made a lasting impression. 
From the moment I checked in, he greeted me with a smile and took care of every little detail.
 I was truly touched by his thoughtfulness—he even remembered my name every time we met. I’ve traveled all over the world, but I’ve never met a manager as kind and attentive as BAYU. He is the reason Kempinski Bali will remain so memorable to me.
It is so sad that we couldn't meet him for the last time before leaving the hotel, because it was his day off. (We miss you BAYU, hope to see you again on our next trip - heeran and jihye)
The mini-bar was refilled once a day (there were two mini bars in the room). We actually didn't have a chance to use them, because we could go to the Villa Lounge and had snacks and drinks. 
Oh! the water was clean! It would be important to people in my country. I was worried by some horrible reviews before I go, but the Villa water was clean. I used a filter, it didn't turn very dirty or yellow.
Overall, I can say this is the best hotel and resort in Bali.

I would like to extend my sincere appreciation to Ammar for his warm welcome and outstanding hospitality. His friendly attitude, professionalism, and genuine dedication to guest satisfaction truly made our stay memorable.

This was my second trip to Bali, and this hotel is quite new. The lobby and rooms are divided into several areas, requiring two elevator transfers, similar to a stepped building. First-timers might need to consult a map.

Overall, I was satisfied with my stay and would recommend it to families and water enthusiasts. Besides the hotel's approximately 4-5 swimming pools, some room types also have indoor pools, allowing you to choose according to your preferences. The beach is somewhat like an inner and outer bay, offering various activities depending on the tides, such as SUP (straight up) and canoeing (free). At low tide, you can observe crabs, wade in the waves, and enjoy activities like camel riding and volleyball. There are different restaurant options, so I recommend making reservations beforehand. The popular Koral restaurant is easily booked. Also, please note the age restrictions for dining. I would suggest the hotel recommend 1-2 restaurants and activities for first-time guests. The rooms are clean, with housekeeping services morning and evening. You can also request housekeeping separately. The mini-bar is free once. The pool has a small waterslide or an infinity pool. Special room types include complimentary afternoon tea and Happy Hour.

Recommended for those looking to relax, suitable for 2-4 night stays.

From the moment I arrived at The Apurva Kempinski Bali, I felt an immediate shift.

The service and hospitality throughout my stay were spectacular. Quiet attentiveness. Smiles everywhere. A sense of care that felt natural rather than rehearsed.

One afternoon by the pool, I became unwell from travel fatigue. I mentioned it casually. Within minutes, a pool attendant returned with a cup of warm ginger tea and tissues, without being asked. That moment stayed with me.

Many of the meals were unforgettable. I found myself describing them as truly orgasmic. Delicious, thoughtful, and beautifully prepared.

I look forward to returning next year.

We had an absolutely outstanding stay at this resort. During our visit, we explored almost all of the restaurants and facilities, and nearly every experience exceeded our expectations. Each venue offered something unique, and we were consistently impressed by the quality, atmosphere, and attention to detail throughout the property.

We would especially like to give our highest appreciation to Lady in Red – Naomi. She took exceptional care of us during our stay, thoughtfully reminding us of daily activities and helping us arrange our itinerary with great patience and professionalism. I have honestly never experienced this level of personalized and attentive service before. She also checked on us every morning during breakfast, which made us feel truly welcomed and well cared for.

On our first day in Bali, we visited Reef, where Anggi warmly hosted us. She not only recommended excellent dishes but also continuously checked on our dining experience, making sure everything was perfect.

At the Rooftop Bar, Juli impressed us with his deep knowledge and passion for the drinks he served. His recommendations were spot-on and perfectly suited to our preferences. Unfortunately, we only had time to visit during happy hour once — had we met him earlier, we would gladly have returned every day.

At Bai Yun Restaurant, Chef Ho Weng Kit personally came to our table to explain the dishes and the preparation behind them. It was clear that the restaurant uses high-quality, authentic ingredients — even the condiments reflected great care and thoughtfulness. Bai Yun is truly a must-visit, especially on weekends.

We also visited the spa three times during our stay, and each visit was excellent. The staff remembered us and consistently provided warm, attentive service, for which we are very grateful.

Lastly, we would like to highlight that every staff member we encountered was extremely polite and genuinely welcoming. No matter where we went, we were always greeted with sincere smiles and kindness. We truly give this resort our highest recommendation and look forward to returning again in the future.

We stayed at this hotel with my husband and our nine-month-old son and had a truly lovely experience from start to finish.

The service from check-in to check-out was flawless. Everyone was extremely helpful, professional, and kind, which made traveling with a baby feel easy and stress-free.

The lobby is absolutely stunning — honestly one of the most beautiful hotel lobbies I have ever seen. The architecture, the art in every corner, and the overall design are breathtaking. Sometimes we would simply sit there with a coffee and enjoy the atmosphere. It’s a space you really want to spend time in.

The rooms are spacious, very comfortable, and always spotlessly clean. Housekeeping deserves special mention: they were incredibly considerate and flexible, always adjusting their cleaning times around our baby’s nap schedule, which we really appreciated.

We stayed in a Junior Suite, so breakfast was served in the lounge. This was a wonderful touch — quieter, more personalized, and with a higher level of service and attention. Even though the hotel was fully booked during our stay, it never felt crowded at all, as the property is very large and well designed.

There is a great selection of restaurants to choose from for dinner, and the gym is very well equipped and enjoyable to use.

The only area that didn’t fully meet our expectations was the spa. While the massage itself was nice, the overall layout felt a bit unusual. The rooms and sauna area are quite small, and there isn’t really a proper relaxation space — more of a small corner that doesn’t quite feel like a true spa environment. That said, this is a personal preference, and others may enjoy it more.

Overall, we had a fantastic stay and felt very well taken care of. The hotel is elegant, comfortable, and extremely family-friendly, with outstanding service throughout. We would definitely recommend it and would happily return.

Title: A "White Lotus" Dream Come True – The Ultimate Luxury Escape!
Overall Rating: 4.67/5 Stars

If you’ve watched The White Lotus, you know that feeling of stepping into a resort so grand it feels like a high-end movie set. The Apurva Kempinski Bali isn't just a hotel; it’s an architectural masterpiece. To be honest, it makes the Ritz Carlton next door look like a 3-star hotel by comparison.

The Service: Pure VVIP Treatment
The service here is legendary. A massive shoutout to Irfansyah and Kelvin, who were absolute gems. They didn’t just hand us a key; they took the time to explain every detail of our suite with genuine warmth. It’s that rare, high-tier service that makes you feel truly special from the moment you arrive.

The Suite: Cliff Ocean Perfection
We stayed in the Cliff Ocean Suite, and the view was simply breathtaking—waking up to the vast, uninterrupted ocean view was a spiritual experience. The suite itself is a sanctuary, complete with its own private pool. Two things I have to emphasize:

The air-conditioning is incredibly strong (a total lifesaver in the Bali heat).

The attention to detail is top-notch, from the quality toiletries to the soaps that smell absolutely divine.

Exclusive Perks & Dining
Cliff Ocean Lounge: If you want a quiet and serene start to your day, this is the place. Having breakfast here was peaceful and exclusive—away from the main crowds.

Food & Drink: The main restaurant is a gorgeous place to dine, and the room service menu is surprisingly extensive and high quality. We also loved the various cafes with a view scattered around.

The "Insta" Factor: The property is a dream for photographers; there are Insta-worthy spots situated all over the grounds.

Pro-Tips & Things to Note
Night View: Make sure to head down to the beach at night. The view of the property lit up against the dark water is magical.

Shopping: If you need gifts, the on-site souvenir shop is surprisingly decently priced for a luxury resort.

Location: The resort is a bit far from local amenities and not exactly walkable to nearby shops. However, this isn't an issue as there is a taxi rank right outside the hotel entrance ready to take you wherever you need to go.

Final Verdict
This stay was the epitome of luxury and drama. As Armond from The White Lotus would say:

"They must be treated like sensitive children. They want to feel special. They want to be the only child in the house."

At The Apurva, they definitely make you feel like the only child. I can't wait to come back!
One of the unforgettable experiences

For the rest of the day, the main restaurant is gorgeous, and even the room service menu is surprisingly extensive and high quality.

The entire property is a photographer's dream, too. There are "Insta-worthy" spots basically every five feet. One pro-tip: make sure to head down to the beach at night. Seeing the entire resort lit up against the dark water is pure magic.

A Few Logistics Just a heads-up on the location—the resort is a bit tucked away from local shops and isn't exactly "walkable." However, it wasn't an issue at all because there’s a taxi rank right outside the entrance ready to take you wherever you need to go. Also, if you’re looking for gifts, the on-site souvenir shop is actually decently priced, which surprised me for a luxury spot.

The Verdict This stay was the epitome of luxury and drama. To quote Armond from The White Lotus:

"They must be treated like sensitive children. They want to feel special. They want to be the only child in the house."

At The Apurva, they definitely make you feel like the only child. I’m already planning my trip back!

Also a big thank you to the cliff lounge service team who looked after us at every meal, always friendly, professional, and attentive without being intrusive. And the housekeeping team — the room was immaculate every single day and maintained to an incredibly high standard.

This is a resort that gets the details right and makes you feel truly looked after. We left relaxed, happy, and already planning a return.

Special shout out to chefs Leonie and Sudarti and cliff lounge team Vanny,Zipan, Padma and Pande and housekeeping Gale and Eddie
